AI助手:
可以，下面给你一个**专门测试新 `fc1_weight_bank.sv` 的独立 tb**。

这个 tb 的目标很明确：

## 它验证两件事
1. `ob`、`ib` 给定后，**下一拍** `w_tile` 是否更新  
2. `w_tile[tr][tc]` 的解包顺序，是否和 packed tile 文件一致

---

# 使用前提

这个 tb 假设你现在的 `fc1_weight_bank.sv` 是我刚给你的新版本，也就是：

- 新增了 `clk`
- 读取 **packed tile 格式** 的 `fc1_weight_int8.hex`

## 重要提醒
这个 tb 用的 `DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE`：

```systemverilog id="2o5wfx"
../data_packed/weights/fc1_weight_int8.hex
```

所以你现在的 `fc1_weight_int8.hex` **必须已经是 packed tile 格式**，不是旧的逐元素一行格式。

---

# 新 tb：`tb_fc1_weight_bank.sv`

```systemverilog id="4z5ss8"
`timescale 1ns / 1ps

module tb_fc1_weight_bank;
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/weights/fc1_weight_int8.hex";

  logic clk;
  logic [$clog2(N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ob;
  logic [$clog2(N_INPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0]  ib;

  logic signed [WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:0]
      w_tile [0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1]
             [0:TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1];

  // golden packed memory: one line = one tile
  localparam int TILE_ELEMS = TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE * TILE_INPUT_SIZE;
  localparam int TILE_BITS  = TILE_ELEMS * WEIGHT_WIDTH;
  localparam int TILE_DEPTH = N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS * N_INPUT_BLOCKS;

  logic [TILE_BITS-1:0] golden_tile_mem [0:TILE_DEPTH-1];
  logic [TILE_BITS-1:0] golden_tile_word;

  integer tr, tc;
  integer flat_idx;
  integer err_count;
  integer tile_idx;

  fc1_weight_bank #(
      .DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE)
  ) dut (
      .clk   (clk),
      .ob    (ob),
      .ib    (ib),
      .w_tile(w_tile)
  );

  initial clk = 1'b0;
  always #5 clk = ~clk;

  initial begin
    $display("============================================================");
    $display("tb_fc1_weight_bank");
    $display("DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = %s", DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE);
    $display("============================================================");

    $readmemh(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE, golden_tile_mem);

    err_count = 0;
    ob = '0;
    ib = '0;

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // Test 1: first tile ob=0 ib=0
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    tile_idx = 0 * N_INPUT_BLOCKS + 0;
    golden_tile_word = golden_tile_mem[tile_idx];

    @(posedge clk);
    ob <= '0;
    ib <= '0;

    // synchronous ROM: wait one more clock for output register
    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST1] check ob=0 ib=0");

    for (tr = 0; tr < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; tr = tr + 1) begin
      for (tc = 0; tc < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; tc = tc + 1) begin
        flat_idx = tr * TILE_INPUT_SIZE + tc;
        if (w_tile[tr][tc] !== golden_tile_word[flat_idx*WEIGHT_WIDTH +: WEIGHT_WIDTH]) begin
          $display("ERROR TEST1 tr=%0d tc=%0d got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
                   tr, tc,
                   w_tile[tr][tc] & 8'hFF,
                   golden_tile_word[flat_idx*WEIGHT_WIDTH +: WEIGHT_WIDTH] & 8'hFF);
          err_count = err_count + 1;
        end
      end
    end

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // Test 2: another tile, choose last tile to catch addressing
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    tile_idx = (N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1) * N_INPUT_BLOCKS + (N_INPUT_BLOCKS-1);
    golden_tile_word = golden_tile_mem[tile_idx];

    @(posedge clk);
    ob <= N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1;
    ib <= N_INPUT_BLOCKS-1;

    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST2] check ob=%0d ib=%0d", N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1, N_INPUT_BLOCKS-1);

    for (tr = 0; tr < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; tr = tr + 1) begin
      for (tc = 0; tc < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; tc = tc + 1) begin
        flat_idx = tr * TILE_INPUT_SIZE + tc;
        if (w_tile[tr][tc] !== golden_tile_word[flat_idx*WEIGHT_WIDTH +: WEIGHT_WIDTH]) begin
          $display("ERROR TEST2 tr=%0d tc=%0d got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
                   tr, tc,
                   w_tile[tr][tc] & 8'hFF,
                   golden_tile_word[flat_idx*WEIGHT_WIDTH +: WEIGHT_WIDTH] & 8'hFF);
          err_count = err_count + 1;
        end
      end
    end

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // Summary
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    if (err_count == 0) begin
      $display("PASS: fc1_weight_bank tile addressing/unpacking is correct.");
    end else begin
      $display("FAIL: fc1_weight_bank found %0d mismatches.", err_count);
    end

    $finish;
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 这个 tb 需要哪些文件参与编译

最小需要：

- `rtl/pkg/package.sv`
- `rtl/mem/fc1_weight_bank.sv`
- `tb/tb_fc1_weight_bank.sv`

---

# 一个简单的 run 脚本写法

如果你想先快速单测这个模块，可以临时这样跑 VCS：

```bash id="1g3q8a"
vcs -full64 -sverilog -timescale=1ns/1ps \
  ../rtl/pkg/package.sv \
  ../rtl/mem/fc1_weight_bank.sv \
  ../tb/tb_fc1_weight_bank.sv \
  -top tb_fc1_weight_bank \
  -o ../sim/tb_fc1_weight_bank_simv

../sim/tb_fc1_weight_bank_simv
```

---

# 这个 tb 通过后说明什么
如果这个 tb 通过，说明：

- `fc1_weight_bank` 的地址计算没错
- packed tile 的解包顺序没错
- 这个模块本身可以单独认为是正确的

然后你再去改下一个模块，比如：

- `fc1_bias_bank.sv`
- `mnist_sample_rom.sv`

这样就很适合你现在这个“逐模块验证”的路线。

还要继续的话，下一步最自然就是给 `fc1_bias_bank` 也写一个对应的独立 tb。

用户:

	${RTL_DIR}/package.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/quantize_param_bank.sv \

	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/sim_tb_mnist_cim_accel_ip.log

## `scripts/run_tb_fc1_weight_bank.sh`

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

SIM_DIR=../sim
RTL_DIR=../rtl
TB_DIR=../tb

mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}
mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}/log

vcs -full64 -sverilog -timescale=1ns/1ps \
	-debug_access+all \
	-o ${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc1_weight_bank_simv \
	${RTL_DIR}/pkg/package.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc1_weight_bank.sv \
	${TB_DIR}/tb_fc1_weight_bank.sv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/compile_tb_fc1_weight_bank.log

${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc1_weight_bank_simv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/sim_tb_fc1_weight_bank.log
```

---

## 配套的 tb 默认路径
为了让这个脚本直接能跑，你的 `tb_fc1_weight_bank.sv` 里建议默认写成：

```systemverilog
parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/weights/fc1_weight_int8.hex";
```

这样脚本不用再额外传参。

---

## 如果你也想做成“可覆盖路径”的版本
也可以把脚本改成这样：

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

SIM_DIR=../sim
RTL_DIR=../rtl
TB_DIR=../tb

WEIGHT_HEX_FILE="${WEIGHT_HEX_FILE:-../data_packed/weights/fc1_weight_int8.hex}"

mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}
mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}/log

vcs -full64 -sverilog -timescale=1ns/1ps \
	-debug_access+all \
	-pvalue+tb_fc1_weight_bank.DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE="${WEIGHT_HEX_FILE}" \
	-o ${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc1_weight_bank_simv \
	${RTL_DIR}/pkg/package.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc1_weight_bank.sv \
	${TB_DIR}/tb_fc1_weight_bank.sv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/compile_tb_fc1_weight_bank.log

${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc1_weight_bank_simv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/sim_tb_fc1_weight_bank.log
```

这样你可以这样跑：

```bash id="9f2hvv"
cd scripts
bash run_tb_fc1_weight_bank.sh
```

或者指定文件：

```bash id="xg2i06"
cd scripts
WEIGHT_HEX_FILE=../data_packed/weights/fc1_weight_int8.hex bash run_tb_fc1_weight_bank.sh
```

# 下一个最应该改的文件

## 我建议下一步改：`fc1_bias_bank.sv`

原因很直接：

- 它和 `fc1_weight_bank` 属于同一层
- 都是 FC1 datapath 的 ROM 输入
- 都要改成 BRAM-friendly 的同步读
- 改完后可以把 FC1 的 **weight + bias** 两块基础输入都确认下来
- 再往上改 `mnist_sample_rom` / `fc1_ob_engine_shared_input` 时，底层会更稳

所以顺序建议是：

1. `fc1_weight_bank.sv` ✅ 已过
2. **`fc1_bias_bank.sv`** ← 现在改
3. `mnist_sample_rom.sv`
4. `fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sv`
5. `fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv`

---

# 先给你修改后的 `fc1_bias_bank.sv`

这版和你通过的 `fc1_weight_bank.sv` 风格一致：

- 新增 `clk`
- 读取 packed block 格式的 `fc1_bias_int32.hex`
- 一拍同步读
- 输出接口 `bias_block[16]` 保持不变

```systemverilog id="jl8x7f"
module fc1_bias_bank #(
    parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE = "fc1_bias_int32.hex"
) (
    input logic clk,
    input logic [$clog2(mnist_cim_pkg::N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ob,

    output logic signed [mnist_cim_pkg::BIAS_WIDTH-1:0]
        bias_block [0:mnist_cim_pkg::TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1]
);

  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  localparam int BLOCK_BITS = TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE * BIAS_WIDTH;

  // One packed line = one 16-element bias block
  (* rom_style = "block" *)
  logic [BLOCK_BITS-1:0] bias_mem [0:N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1];

  logic [BLOCK_BITS-1:0] bias_word_r;

  integer i;

  initial begin
`ifndef SYNTHESIS
    $display("Using packed FC1 bias block file: %s", DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE);
`endif
    $readmemh(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE, bias_mem);
  end

  // synchronous ROM read
  always_ff @(posedge clk) begin
    bias_word_r <= bias_mem[ob];
  end

  // unpack block
  // bias_block[i] = bias_word_r[i*BIAS_WIDTH +: BIAS_WIDTH]
  always_comb begin
    for (i = 0; i < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; i = i + 1) begin
      bias_block[i] = bias_word_r[i*BIAS_WIDTH +: BIAS_WIDTH];
    end
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 独立 tb：`tb_fc1_bias_bank.sv`

这个 tb 和你刚才通过的 `tb_fc1_weight_bank.sv` 思路一致，测试：

- `ob=0`
- `ob=N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1`

并检查：

- 一拍后 `bias_block[i]`
- 是否和 packed 文件一致

```systemverilog id="2b8gf0"
`timescale 1ns / 1ps

module tb_fc1_bias_bank;
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/weights/fc1_bias_int32.hex";

  logic clk;
  logic [$clog2(N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ob;

  logic signed [BIAS_WIDTH-1:0]
      bias_block [0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];

  localparam int BLOCK_BITS  = TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE * BIAS_WIDTH;
  localparam int BLOCK_DEPTH = N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS;

  logic [BLOCK_BITS-1:0] golden_bias_mem [0:BLOCK_DEPTH-1];
  logic [BLOCK_BITS-1:0] golden_bias_word;

  integer i;
  integer err_count;

  fc1_bias_bank #(
      .DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE)
  ) dut (
      .clk       (clk),
      .ob        (ob),
      .bias_block(bias_block)
  );

  initial clk = 1'b0;
  always #5 clk = ~clk;

  initial begin
    $display("============================================================");
    $display("tb_fc1_bias_bank");
    $display("DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE = %s", DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE);
    $display("============================================================");

    $readmemh(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE, golden_bias_mem);

    err_count = 0;
    ob = '0;

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST1: ob = 0
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    golden_bias_word = golden_bias_mem[0];

    @(posedge clk);
    ob <= '0;

    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST1] check ob=0");
    for (i = 0; i < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; i = i + 1) begin
      if (bias_block[i] !== golden_bias_word[i*BIAS_WIDTH +: BIAS_WIDTH]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST1 i=%0d got=0x%08x exp=0x%08x",
                 i,
                 bias_block[i],
                 golden_bias_word[i*BIAS_WIDTH +: BIAS_WIDTH]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST2: ob = N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    golden_bias_word = golden_bias_mem[N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1];

    @(posedge clk);
    ob <= N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1;

    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST2] check ob=%0d", N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1);
    for (i = 0; i < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; i = i + 1) begin
      if (bias_block[i] !== golden_bias_word[i*BIAS_WIDTH +: BIAS_WIDTH]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST2 i=%0d got=0x%08x exp=0x%08x",
                 i,
                 bias_block[i],
                 golden_bias_word[i*BIAS_WIDTH +: BIAS_WIDTH]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    if (err_count == 0) begin
      $display("PASS: fc1_bias_bank block addressing/unpacking is correct.");
    end else begin
      $display("FAIL: fc1_bias_bank found %0d mismatches.", err_count);
    end

    $finish;
  end

endmodule
```

---

```bash id="50qldd"
#!/usr/bin/env bash

	${TB_DIR}/tb_fc1_bias_bank.sv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/compile_tb_fc1_bias_bank.log

	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/sim_tb_fc1_bias_bank.log
```

---

# 这个模块测试时要注意什么

## `fc1_bias_int32.hex` 必须是 packed block 格式
也就是：

- 一行 = 16 个 bias
- 不是旧的逐元素一行格式

这点你后面跑 `vivado_build` 之前我也会继续提醒你：

### 现在这些文件都已经是新格式
- `fc1_weight_int8.hex`：packed tile
- `fc1_bias_int32.hex`：packed block
- `mnist_samples_route_b_output_2.hex`：packed tile
- `input_*.hex`：packed tile

---

因为那样 FC1 底层三块输入：

- weight
- bias
- sample

就都单测过了。

如果你想，我下一轮就继续按同样风格给你 `mnist_sample_rom.sv` 的修改版、tb、run.sh。

## 下一个最应该改的文件
**`rtl/mem/mnist_sample_rom.sv`**

原因是现在 FC1 底层三块输入里：

- weight 已改
- bias 已改
- **sample 还没改**

把 `mnist_sample_rom` 改完并单测通过后，下一步就能更稳地改：

- `fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sv`
- `fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv`

---

# 1) 修改后的 `rtl/mem/mnist_sample_rom.sv`

这版改成：

- 新增 `clk`
- 读取 **packed sample tile** 格式
- 一拍同步读
- 输出接口仍保持：
  - `x_tile[16]`
  - `x_eff_tile[16]`

```systemverilog
module mnist_sample_rom #(
    parameter int N_SAMPLES = 20,
    parameter string DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE = "mnist_samples_route_b_output_2.hex"
) (
    input logic clk,
    input logic [$clog2(N_SAMPLES)-1:0] sample_id,
    input logic [$clog2(mnist_cim_pkg::N_INPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ib,

    output logic signed [mnist_cim_pkg::INPUT_WIDTH-1:0]
        x_tile[0:mnist_cim_pkg::TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1],

    output logic [mnist_cim_pkg::X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]
        x_eff_tile[0:mnist_cim_pkg::TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1]
);
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  localparam int TILE_BITS  = TILE_INPUT_SIZE * INPUT_WIDTH;
  localparam int TILE_DEPTH = N_SAMPLES * N_INPUT_BLOCKS;

  // One packed line = one input tile
  (* rom_style = "block" *)
  logic [TILE_BITS-1:0] sample_mem [0:TILE_DEPTH-1];

  logic [TILE_BITS-1:0] tile_word_r;
  logic [$clog2(TILE_DEPTH)-1:0] tile_addr;

  integer i;
  integer x_eff_tmp;

  assign tile_addr = sample_id * N_INPUT_BLOCKS + ib;

  initial begin
`ifndef SYNTHESIS
    $display("Using packed sample tile file: %s", DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE);
`endif
    $readmemh(DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE, sample_mem);
  end

  // synchronous ROM read
  always_ff @(posedge clk) begin
    tile_word_r <= sample_mem[tile_addr];
  end

  // unpack tile
  // x_tile[i] = tile_word_r[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH]
  always_comb begin
    for (i = 0; i < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; i = i + 1) begin
      x_tile[i] = tile_word_r[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH];

      x_eff_tmp = $signed(x_tile[i]) - INPUT_ZERO_POINT;
      if (x_eff_tmp < 0)
        x_eff_tile[i] = '0;
      else if (x_eff_tmp > ((1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1))
        x_eff_tile[i] = {X_EFF_WIDTH{1'b1}};
      else
        x_eff_tile[i] = x_eff_tmp[X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0];
    end
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 2) 独立 tb：`tb/tb_mnist_sample_rom.sv`

这个 tb 测两件事：

1. `sample_id, ib` 给定后，下一拍 `x_tile` 是否正确
2. `x_eff_tile` 是否和 `x_tile - INPUT_ZERO_POINT` 一致

为了避免第一块全是 `0x80` 不好看，这里我测试两个 tile：

- `sample_id=0, ib=0`
- `sample_id=0, ib=1`

```systemverilog
`timescale 1ns / 1ps

module tb_mnist_sample_rom;
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  parameter int N_SAMPLES = 20;
  parameter string DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/samples/mnist_samples_route_b_output_2.hex";

  logic clk;
  logic [$clog2(N_SAMPLES)-1:0] sample_id;
  logic [$clog2(N_INPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ib;

  logic signed [INPUT_WIDTH-1:0] x_tile[0:TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1];
  logic [X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]        x_eff_tile[0:TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1];

  localparam int TILE_BITS  = TILE_INPUT_SIZE * INPUT_WIDTH;
  localparam int TILE_DEPTH = N_SAMPLES * N_INPUT_BLOCKS;

  logic [TILE_BITS-1:0] golden_sample_mem [0:TILE_DEPTH-1];
  logic [TILE_BITS-1:0] golden_tile_word;

  integer i;
  integer err_count;
  integer tile_idx;
  integer x_eff_exp;

  mnist_sample_rom #(
      .N_SAMPLES(N_SAMPLES),
      .DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE)
  ) dut (
      .clk       (clk),
      .sample_id (sample_id),
      .ib        (ib),
      .x_tile    (x_tile),
      .x_eff_tile(x_eff_tile)
  );

  initial clk = 1'b0;
  always #5 clk = ~clk;

  initial begin
    $display("============================================================");
    $display("tb_mnist_sample_rom");
    $display("DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE = %s", DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE);
    $display("============================================================");

    $readmemh(DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE, golden_sample_mem);

    err_count = 0;
    sample_id = '0;
    ib        = '0;

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST1: sample_id=0, ib=0
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    tile_idx = 0 * N_INPUT_BLOCKS + 0;
    golden_tile_word = golden_sample_mem[tile_idx];

    @(posedge clk);
    sample_id <= '0;
    ib        <= '0;

    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST1] check sample_id=0 ib=0");
    for (i = 0; i < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; i = i + 1) begin
      if (x_tile[i] !== golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST1 x_tile i=%0d got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
                 i,
                 x_tile[i] & 8'hFF,
                 golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH] & 8'hFF);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end

      x_eff_exp = $signed(golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH]) - INPUT_ZERO_POINT;
      if (x_eff_exp < 0)
        x_eff_exp = 0;
      else if (x_eff_exp > ((1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1))
        x_eff_exp = (1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1;

      if (x_eff_tile[i] !== x_eff_exp[X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST1 x_eff i=%0d got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
                 i,
                 x_eff_tile[i],
                 x_eff_exp[X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST2: sample_id=0, ib=1
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    tile_idx = 0 * N_INPUT_BLOCKS + 1;
    golden_tile_word = golden_sample_mem[tile_idx];

    @(posedge clk);
    sample_id <= '0;
    ib        <= 1;

    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST2] check sample_id=0 ib=1");
    for (i = 0; i < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; i = i + 1) begin
      if (x_tile[i] !== golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST2 x_tile i=%0d got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
                 i,
                 x_tile[i] & 8'hFF,
                 golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH] & 8'hFF);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end

      x_eff_exp = $signed(golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH]) - INPUT_ZERO_POINT;
      if (x_eff_exp < 0)
        x_eff_exp = 0;
      else if (x_eff_exp > ((1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1))
        x_eff_exp = (1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1;

      if (x_eff_tile[i] !== x_eff_exp[X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST2 x_eff i=%0d got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
                 i,
                 x_eff_tile[i],
                 x_eff_exp[X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    if (err_count == 0) begin
      $display("PASS: mnist_sample_rom tile addressing/unpacking/x_eff is correct.");
    end else begin
      $display("FAIL: mnist_sample_rom found %0d mismatches.", err_count);
    end

    $finish;
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 3) 脚本：`scripts/run_tb_mnist_sample_rom.sh`

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

SIM_DIR=../sim
RTL_DIR=../rtl
TB_DIR=../tb

mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}
mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}/log

vcs -full64 -sverilog -timescale=1ns/1ps \
	-debug_access+all \
	-o ${SIM_DIR}/tb_mnist_sample_rom_simv \
	${RTL_DIR}/pkg/package.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/mnist_sample_rom.sv \
	${TB_DIR}/tb_mnist_sample_rom.sv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/compile_tb_mnist_sample_rom.log

${SIM_DIR}/tb_mnist_sample_rom_simv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/sim_tb_mnist_sample_rom.log
```

---

# 4) 这个模块测试时要注意什么

现在这个 tb 读的是：

```text
../data_packed/samples/mnist_samples_route_b_output_2.hex
```

所以你要继续记住：

## 它必须是新的 packed tile 格式
不是旧的逐元素一行格式。

这件事后面你再跑 `vivado_build` 前我也会继续提醒你。

---

# 5) 当前修改顺序建议

你现在最合理的推进顺序是：

1. `fc1_weight_bank.sv` ✅
2. `fc1_bias_bank.sv` ✅
3. **`mnist_sample_rom.sv`** ← 现在做
4. `fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sv`
5. `fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv`

这样你在改第 4、5 个模块时，底层三块输入 ROM 都已经有独立单测保证。

如果你跑完 `tb_mnist_sample_rom`，把日志贴出来，我就接着给你下一个 `fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sv` 的修改版、tb 和 run.sh。

## 下一个最应该改的文件
**`rtl/core/fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sv`**

原因：

- 它正好把前面三块底层输入接起来
- 也是 FC1 datapath 里第一个真正“用到新同步 ROM”的模块
- 先把它单测过，再去改 `fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv` 会稳很多

---

# 1) 修改后的 `rtl/core/fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sv`

这版的修改重点只有一个：

- 适配你已经改好的 **同步读** `fc1_weight_bank` / `fc1_bias_bank`
- 因此实例化要接 `clk`

这个模块本身不额外加 FSM；  
它的正确使用方式是：

> 外层在改变 `ib / ob_sel` 后，至少等 1 拍，再拉高 `en_psum`

这正是我们下一步改 `fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv` 时要做的。

```systemverilog id="yv0jsa"
module fc1_ob_engine_shared_input #(
    parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "fc1_weight_int8.hex",
    parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE   = "fc1_bias_int32.hex"
) (
    input logic clk,
    input logic rst_n,

    input logic clear_psum,
    input logic en_psum,

    input logic [$clog2(mnist_cim_pkg::N_INPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ib,
    input logic [$clog2(mnist_cim_pkg::N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ob_sel,

    input logic [mnist_cim_pkg::X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]
        x_eff_tile[0:mnist_cim_pkg::TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1],

    output logic signed [mnist_cim_pkg::PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]
        fc1_acc_block [0:mnist_cim_pkg::TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1]
);
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  logic signed [WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:0] w_tile[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1][0:TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1];
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]   tile_psum[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]   psum[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];
  logic signed [BIAS_WIDTH-1:0]   bias_block[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]   fc1_acc_with_bias[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];

  fc1_weight_bank #(
      .DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE)
  ) u_fc1_weight_bank (
      .clk   (clk),
      .ob    (ob_sel),
      .ib    (ib),
      .w_tile(w_tile)
  );

  cim_tile u_cim_tile (
      .x_eff_tile(x_eff_tile),
      .w_tile    (w_tile),
      .tile_psum (tile_psum)
  );

  psum_accum u_psum_accum (
      .clk      (clk),
      .rst_n    (rst_n),
      .clear    (clear_psum),
      .en       (en_psum),
      .tile_psum(tile_psum),
      .psum     (psum)
  );

  fc1_bias_bank #(
      .DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE)
  ) u_fc1_bias_bank (
      .clk       (clk),
      .ob        (ob_sel),
      .bias_block(bias_block)
  );

  genvar g;
  generate
    for (g = 0; g < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; g = g + 1) begin : GEN_OUT
      assign fc1_acc_with_bias[g] = psum[g] + bias_block[g];
      assign fc1_acc_block[g]     = fc1_acc_with_bias[g];
    end
  endgenerate

endmodule
```

---

# 2) 独立 tb：`tb/tb_fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sv`

这个 tb 测三件事：

1. 改变 `ob_sel/ib` 后，等待 1 拍，再 `en_psum`
2. 第一次累加后：
   - `fc1_acc_block = tile_psum + bias`
3. 不清零再累加一次后：
   - `fc1_acc_block = 2*tile_psum + bias`
4. 再 clear 后：
   - `fc1_acc_block = bias`

为了不依赖 sample ROM，这里直接手工给一个简单的 `x_eff_tile`。

```systemverilog id="e78nse"
`timescale 1ns / 1ps

module tb_fc1_ob_engine_shared_input;
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/weights/fc1_weight_int8.hex";
  parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE   = "../data_packed/weights/fc1_bias_int32.hex";

  logic clk;
  logic rst_n;

  logic clear_psum;
  logic en_psum;

  logic [$clog2(N_INPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0]  ib;
  logic [$clog2(N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ob_sel;

  logic [X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0] x_eff_tile[0:TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1];

  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]
      fc1_acc_block[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];

  // ------------------------------------------------------------
  // golden memories
  // ------------------------------------------------------------
  localparam int TILE_ELEMS  = TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE * TILE_INPUT_SIZE;
  localparam int TILE_BITS   = TILE_ELEMS * WEIGHT_WIDTH;
  localparam int TILE_DEPTH  = N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS * N_INPUT_BLOCKS;
  localparam int BLOCK_BITS  = TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE * BIAS_WIDTH;

  logic [TILE_BITS-1:0]  golden_weight_mem[0:TILE_DEPTH-1];
  logic [BLOCK_BITS-1:0] golden_bias_mem[0:N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1];

  integer r, c;
  integer flat_idx;
  integer err_count;
  integer tile_idx;

  logic signed [WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:0] golden_w;
  logic signed [BIAS_WIDTH-1:0]   golden_b;
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]   expected_tile_psum[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]   expected_once[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]   expected_twice[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]   expected_clear[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];

  fc1_ob_engine_shared_input #(
      .DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE),
      .DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE  (DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE)
  ) dut (
      .clk         (clk),
      .rst_n       (rst_n),
      .clear_psum  (clear_psum),
      .en_psum     (en_psum),
      .ib          (ib),
      .ob_sel      (ob_sel),
      .x_eff_tile  (x_eff_tile),
      .fc1_acc_block(fc1_acc_block)
  );

  initial clk = 1'b0;
  always #5 clk = ~clk;

  initial begin
    $display("============================================================");
    $display("tb_fc1_ob_engine_shared_input");
    $display("DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = %s", DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE);
    $display("DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE   = %s", DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE);
    $display("============================================================");

    $readmemh(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE, golden_weight_mem);
    $readmemh(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE,   golden_bias_mem);

    err_count  = 0;
    rst_n      = 1'b0;
    clear_psum = 1'b0;
    en_psum    = 1'b0;
    ib         = '0;
    ob_sel     = '0;

    // simple deterministic x_eff_tile
    for (c = 0; c < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; c = c + 1) begin
      x_eff_tile[c] = c + 1;
    end

    // choose ob=0 ib=0 first
    tile_idx = 0 * N_INPUT_BLOCKS + 0;

    // golden compute
    for (r = 0; r < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; r = r + 1) begin
      expected_tile_psum[r] = '0;
      for (c = 0; c < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; c = c + 1) begin
        flat_idx = r * TILE_INPUT_SIZE + c;
        golden_w = golden_weight_mem[tile_idx][flat_idx*WEIGHT_WIDTH +: WEIGHT_WIDTH];
        expected_tile_psum[r] = expected_tile_psum[r] + $signed(golden_w) * $signed({1'b0, x_eff_tile[c]});
      end

      golden_b = golden_bias_mem[0][r*BIAS_WIDTH +: BIAS_WIDTH];
      expected_once[r]  = expected_tile_psum[r] + golden_b;
      expected_twice[r] = (expected_tile_psum[r] <<< 1) + golden_b;
      expected_clear[r] = golden_b;
    end

    // release reset
    @(posedge clk);
    rst_n <= 1'b1;

    // set ob/ib, then wait one full cycle for sync ROMs
    @(posedge clk);
    ob_sel <= '0;
    ib     <= '0;

    @(posedge clk); // ROM read latency

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST1: clear then accumulate once
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    @(posedge clk);
    clear_psum <= 1'b1;
    en_psum    <= 1'b0;

    @(posedge clk);
    clear_psum <= 1'b0;
    en_psum    <= 1'b1;

    @(posedge clk);
    en_psum <= 1'b0;
    #1;

    $display("[TEST1] check one accumulation");
    for (r = 0; r < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; r = r + 1) begin
      if (fc1_acc_block[r] !== expected_once[r]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST1 r=%0d got=%0d exp=%0d",
                 r, fc1_acc_block[r], expected_once[r]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST2: accumulate second time without clear
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    @(posedge clk);
    en_psum <= 1'b1;

    @(posedge clk);
    en_psum <= 1'b0;
    #1;

    $display("[TEST2] check two accumulations");
    for (r = 0; r < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; r = r + 1) begin
      if (fc1_acc_block[r] !== expected_twice[r]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST2 r=%0d got=%0d exp=%0d",
                 r, fc1_acc_block[r], expected_twice[r]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST3: clear
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    @(posedge clk);
    clear_psum <= 1'b1;
    en_psum    <= 1'b0;

    @(posedge clk);
    clear_psum <= 1'b0;
    #1;

    $display("[TEST3] check clear");
    for (r = 0; r < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; r = r + 1) begin
      if (fc1_acc_block[r] !== expected_clear[r]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST3 r=%0d got=%0d exp=%0d",
                 r, fc1_acc_block[r], expected_clear[r]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    if (err_count == 0) begin
      $display("PASS: fc1_ob_engine_shared_input weight/bias/psum behavior is correct.");
    end else begin
      $display("FAIL: fc1_ob_engine_shared_input found %0d mismatches.", err_count);
    end

    $finish;
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 3) 脚本：`scripts/run_tb_fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sh`

```bash id="fdjlwm"
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

SIM_DIR=../sim
RTL_DIR=../rtl
TB_DIR=../tb

mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}
mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}/log

vcs -full64 -sverilog -timescale=1ns/1ps \
	-debug_access+all \
	-o ${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc1_ob_engine_shared_input_simv \
	${RTL_DIR}/pkg/package.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc1_weight_bank.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc1_bias_bank.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/cim_tile.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/psum_accum.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sv \
	${TB_DIR}/tb_fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/compile_tb_fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.log

${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc1_ob_engine_shared_input_simv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/sim_tb_fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.log
```

# 4) 这个阶段要继续记住的事

现在你已经单测通过或正在单测的这些模块，输入文件都已经是**新格式**：

- `fc1_weight_int8.hex` → packed tile
- `fc1_bias_int32.hex` → packed block
- `mnist_samples_route_b_output_2.hex` → packed tile
- `input_*.hex` → packed tile

后面你再跑 `vivado_build` 前，我会继续提醒你这件事。

## 下一个最应该改的文件
**`rtl/mem/fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv`**

原因：
- 它是把 `mnist_sample_rom` 和多个 `fc1_ob_engine_shared_input` 串起来的调度层
- 这里必须正确处理你现在已经改成**同步读**的：
  - `mnist_sample_rom`
  - `fc1_weight_bank`
  - `fc1_bias_bank`
- 也是最可能引入“差一拍”问题的地方

---

# 1) 修改后的 `rtl/mem/fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv`

这版核心变化：

- `mnist_sample_rom` 新增 `clk`
- 增加一个 `S_WAIT` 状态
- 流程变成：

`S_IDLE -> S_CLEAR -> S_READ -> S_WAIT -> S_ACCUM -> ... -> S_DONE`

这样能保证：
- 改变 `ib`
- 等待 sample/weight/bias 同步读稳定
- 再 `en_psum`

```systemverilog id="78x2cv"
module fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom #(
    parameter int PAR_OB = 1,
    parameter int N_SAMPLES = 20,
    parameter string DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE = "mnist_samples_route_b_output_2.hex",
    parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "fc1_weight_int8.hex",
    parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE = "fc1_bias_int32.hex"
) (
    input logic clk,
    input logic rst_n,
    input logic start,
    input logic [$clog2(N_SAMPLES)-1:0] sample_id,
    input logic [((mnist_cim_pkg::N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS > 1) ? $clog2(mnist_cim_pkg::N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS) : 1)-1:0] base_ob,

    output logic busy,
    output logic done,

    output logic signed [mnist_cim_pkg::PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]
        fc1_acc_all [0:PAR_OB*mnist_cim_pkg::TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1]
);
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  localparam int OB_SEL_W = (N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS > 1) ? $clog2(N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS) : 1;

  typedef enum logic [2:0] {
    S_IDLE  = 3'd0,
    S_CLEAR = 3'd1,
    S_READ  = 3'd2,
    S_WAIT  = 3'd3,
    S_ACCUM = 3'd4,
    S_DONE  = 3'd5
  } state_t;

  state_t state, state_n;

  logic [$clog2(N_INPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ib, ib_n;
  logic clear_psum;
  logic en_psum;

  logic signed [INPUT_WIDTH-1:0] x_tile[0:TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1];
  logic [X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]        x_eff_tile[0:TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1];

  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0] fc1_acc_block[0:PAR_OB-1][0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];

  mnist_sample_rom #(
      .N_SAMPLES(N_SAMPLES),
      .DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE)
  ) u_mnist_sample_rom (
      .clk       (clk),
      .sample_id (sample_id),
      .ib        (ib),
      .x_tile    (x_tile),
      .x_eff_tile(x_eff_tile)
  );

  always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
      state <= S_IDLE;
      ib    <= '0;
    end else begin
      state <= state_n;
      ib    <= ib_n;
    end
  end

  always_comb begin
    state_n    = state;
    ib_n       = ib;
    clear_psum = 1'b0;
    en_psum    = 1'b0;
    busy       = 1'b0;
    done       = 1'b0;

    case (state)
      S_IDLE: begin
        ib_n = '0;
        if (start)
          state_n = S_CLEAR;
      end

      S_CLEAR: begin
        busy       = 1'b1;
        clear_psum = 1'b1;
        ib_n       = '0;
        state_n    = S_READ;
      end

      S_READ: begin
        busy    = 1'b1;
        state_n = S_WAIT;
      end

      S_WAIT: begin
        busy    = 1'b1;
        state_n = S_ACCUM;
      end

      S_ACCUM: begin
        busy    = 1'b1;
        en_psum = 1'b1;

        if (ib == N_INPUT_BLOCKS - 1) begin
          state_n = S_DONE;
          ib_n    = ib;
        end else begin
          ib_n    = ib + 1'b1;
          state_n = S_READ;
        end
      end

      S_DONE: begin
        done = 1'b1;
        if (!start)
          state_n = S_IDLE;
      end

      default: begin
        state_n    = S_IDLE;
        ib_n       = '0;
        clear_psum = 1'b0;
        en_psum    = 1'b0;
        busy       = 1'b0;
        done       = 1'b0;
      end
    endcase
  end

  genvar g_ob, g_idx;
  generate
    for (g_ob = 0; g_ob < PAR_OB; g_ob = g_ob + 1) begin : GEN_OB_ENGINE
      logic [OB_SEL_W-1:0] ob_sel;

      assign ob_sel = base_ob + g_ob[OB_SEL_W-1:0];

      fc1_ob_engine_shared_input #(
          .DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE),
          .DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE  (DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE)
      ) u_fc1_ob_engine_shared_input (
          .clk         (clk),
          .rst_n       (rst_n),
          .clear_psum  (clear_psum),
          .en_psum     (en_psum),
          .ib          (ib),
          .ob_sel      (ob_sel),
          .x_eff_tile  (x_eff_tile),
          .fc1_acc_block(fc1_acc_block[g_ob])
      );

      for (g_idx = 0; g_idx < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; g_idx = g_idx + 1) begin : GEN_PACK
        assign fc1_acc_all[g_ob*TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE + g_idx] = fc1_acc_block[g_ob][g_idx];
      end
    end
  endgenerate

endmodule
```

---

# 2) 独立 tb：`tb/tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv`

这个 tb 做的事：

- 只测最简单配置：`PAR_OB=1`
- `sample_id=0`
- `base_ob=0`
- 启动一次完整 FC1 block 计算
- 用同样的 packed 数据文件做 golden 计算
- 最后比较 `fc1_acc_all[0:15]`

为了避免依赖大系统，这里直接在 tb 里按定义算 golden：

- 从 packed sample 取每个 `ib` 的 16 个输入
- 从 packed weight 取对应 tile
- 从 packed bias 取 block
- 累加出最终 `fc1_acc_all`

```systemverilog id="20mfxp"
`timescale 1ns / 1ps

module tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom;
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  parameter int PAR_OB = 1;
  parameter int N_SAMPLES = 20;
  parameter string DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/samples/mnist_samples_route_b_output_2.hex";
  parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/weights/fc1_weight_int8.hex";
  parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE   = "../data_packed/weights/fc1_bias_int32.hex";

  logic clk;
  logic rst_n;
  logic start;
  logic [$clog2(N_SAMPLES)-1:0] sample_id;
  logic [((N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS > 1) ? $clog2(N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS) : 1)-1:0] base_ob;

  logic busy, done;
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0] fc1_acc_all[0:PAR_OB*TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];

  localparam int SAMPLE_TILE_BITS = TILE_INPUT_SIZE * INPUT_WIDTH;
  localparam int SAMPLE_TILE_DEPTH = N_SAMPLES * N_INPUT_BLOCKS;
  localparam int WEIGHT_TILE_BITS = TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE * TILE_INPUT_SIZE * WEIGHT_WIDTH;
  localparam int WEIGHT_TILE_DEPTH = N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS * N_INPUT_BLOCKS;
  localparam int BIAS_BLOCK_BITS = TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE * BIAS_WIDTH;

  logic [SAMPLE_TILE_BITS-1:0] golden_sample_mem[0:SAMPLE_TILE_DEPTH-1];
  logic [WEIGHT_TILE_BITS-1:0] golden_weight_mem[0:WEIGHT_TILE_DEPTH-1];
  logic [BIAS_BLOCK_BITS-1:0]  golden_bias_mem[0:N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1];

  integer ib_idx, r, c;
  integer err_count;
  integer sample_tile_idx;
  integer weight_tile_idx;
  integer x_eff_tmp;
  logic signed [INPUT_WIDTH-1:0]  sample_val;
  logic signed [WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:0] weight_val;
  logic signed [BIAS_WIDTH-1:0]   bias_val;
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]   golden_acc[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];

  fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom #(
      .PAR_OB(PAR_OB),
      .N_SAMPLES(N_SAMPLES),
      .DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE),
      .DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE),
      .DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE)
  ) dut (
      .clk        (clk),
      .rst_n      (rst_n),
      .start      (start),
      .sample_id  (sample_id),
      .base_ob    (base_ob),
      .busy       (busy),
      .done       (done),
      .fc1_acc_all(fc1_acc_all)
  );

  initial clk = 1'b0;
  always #5 clk = ~clk;

  initial begin
    $display("============================================================");
    $display("tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom");
    $display("DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE = %s", DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE);
    $display("DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = %s", DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE);
    $display("DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE   = %s", DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE);
    $display("============================================================");

    $readmemh(DEFAULT_SAMPLE_HEX_FILE, golden_sample_mem);
    $readmemh(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE, golden_weight_mem);
    $readmemh(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE,   golden_bias_mem);

    err_count = 0;
    rst_n     = 1'b0;
    start     = 1'b0;
    sample_id = '0;
    base_ob   = '0;

    for (r = 0; r < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; r = r + 1) begin
      bias_val = golden_bias_mem[0][r*BIAS_WIDTH +: BIAS_WIDTH];
      golden_acc[r] = bias_val;
    end

    // golden accumulate over all input blocks
    for (ib_idx = 0; ib_idx < N_INPUT_BLOCKS; ib_idx = ib_idx + 1) begin
      sample_tile_idx = 0 * N_INPUT_BLOCKS + ib_idx;
      weight_tile_idx = 0 * N_INPUT_BLOCKS + ib_idx;

      for (r = 0; r < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; r = r + 1) begin
        for (c = 0; c < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; c = c + 1) begin
          sample_val = golden_sample_mem[sample_tile_idx][c*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH];
          x_eff_tmp  = $signed(sample_val) - INPUT_ZERO_POINT;
          if (x_eff_tmp < 0)
            x_eff_tmp = 0;
          else if (x_eff_tmp > ((1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1))
            x_eff_tmp = (1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1;

          weight_val = golden_weight_mem[weight_tile_idx][(r*TILE_INPUT_SIZE+c)*WEIGHT_WIDTH +: WEIGHT_WIDTH];
          golden_acc[r] = golden_acc[r] + $signed(weight_val) * x_eff_tmp;
        end
      end
    end

    @(posedge clk);
    rst_n <= 1'b1;

    @(posedge clk);
    start <= 1'b1;

    @(posedge clk);
    start <= 1'b0;

    wait (done == 1'b1);
    #1;

    $display("[CHECK] compare fc1_acc_all");
    for (r = 0; r < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; r = r + 1) begin
      if (fc1_acc_all[r] !== golden_acc[r]) begin
        $display("ERROR r=%0d got=%0d exp=%0d", r, fc1_acc_all[r], golden_acc[r]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    if (err_count == 0) begin
      $display("PASS: fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom end-to-end block result is correct.");
    end else begin
      $display("FAIL: fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom found %0d mismatches.", err_count);
    end

    $finish;
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 3) 脚本：`scripts/run_tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sh`

```bash id="ye9g5z"
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

SIM_DIR=../sim
RTL_DIR=../rtl
TB_DIR=../tb

mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}
mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}/log

vcs -full64 -sverilog -timescale=1ns/1ps \
	-debug_access+all \
	-o ${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom_simv \
	${RTL_DIR}/pkg/package.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc1_weight_bank.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc1_bias_bank.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/mnist_sample_rom.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/cim_tile.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/psum_accum.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv \
	${TB_DIR}/tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/compile_tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.log

${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom_simv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/sim_tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.log
```

---

# 4) 这一步之后的顺序

如果这个模块通过，FC1 的 BRAM 化主链就基本打通了：

- weight ROM ✅
- bias ROM ✅
- sample ROM ✅
- ob engine ✅
- scheduler ✅

然后再往上改的下一个就是：

## `rtl/core/mnist_inference_core_board.sv`
或者如果你想先把旧路径也兼容掉，再改：
## `rtl/core/input_buffer.sv`

---

# 5) 继续提醒你
后面再跑仿真或 `vivado_build` 前，要继续记住：

这些文件现在必须是**新的 packed 格式**，不是旧的逐元素一行格式：

- `fc1_weight_int8.hex`
- `fc1_bias_int32.hex`
- `mnist_samples_route_b_output_2.hex`
- `input_*.hex`

如果你跑完这个 tb，把日志贴过来，我就继续给你下一个文件。

用户:

AI助手:
对，你说得对。

## `PAR_OB=1` 不是原始高并行版本
我这里之所以先给你 `PAR_OB=1` 的 tb，不是因为设计本来就该这样，而是因为：

> **在“逐模块改造 + 逐模块验收”的阶段，先用最小并行度把功能验证跑通，最容易定位问题。**

---

# 为什么我先用 `PAR_OB=1`

因为你现在这个阶段的目标不是先保住最高吞吐，而是先确认：

- 同步读 sample ROM 对不对
- 同步读 weight ROM 对不对
- 同步读 bias ROM 对不对
- `S_READ / S_WAIT / S_ACCUM` 这一套时序对不对
- `fc1_acc_all` 的拼接对不对

如果一开始就上高并行，比如：

```systemverilog id="w02bth"
PAR_OB = 8
```

那一个 tb 里会同时带来：

- 8 个 `fc1_ob_engine_shared_input`
- 8 组并行输出 block
- `base_ob + g_ob` 的多路检查
- 更复杂的 golden 对比

这样一旦错了，你很难立刻判断是：

- sample 读延迟错
- weight/bias 对齐错
- `ob_sel` 映射错
- 还是 `fc1_acc_all` 打包错

所以：

## `PAR_OB=1` 是“最小验证配置”
不是说最终设计就该固定成 1。

---

# 这不影响你后面恢复高并行
当前这个模块本身是参数化的：

```systemverilog id="3vxw0f"
parameter int PAR_OB = 1
```

所以后面你完全可以：

- 先用 `PAR_OB=1` 把功能验证过
- 再把 tb 改成 `PAR_OB=2`
- 再试 `PAR_OB=4`
- 最后恢复到你原始想要的高并行版本

---

# 你现在有两个选择

## 方案 A：继续保持 `PAR_OB=1`，先把 BRAM 版整条 FC1 链验证通
优点：
- 最容易 debug
- 最稳
- 适合现在这个阶段

## 方案 B：我现在就给你一个 `PAR_OB=8` 版本的 tb
优点：
- 更接近原始高并行设计
- 能直接验证高并行拼接是否正确

缺点：
- 出错时更难定位

---

# 我的建议
**当前先继续用 `PAR_OB=1` 完成功能验收。**  
等 `fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom` 单测通过后，我再给你补一个：

## `PAR_OB=8` 的增强版 tb

专门验证：
- 多个 `ob_sel`
- 多个 block 并行输出
- `fc1_acc_all[g_ob*TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE + g_idx]` 拼接是否正确

---

# 你这句理解得没错
> “这个应该是并行度高的”

对，**最终原始完整版本的 FC1 设计目标就是高并行**。  
我现在把 tb 先压到 `PAR_OB=1`，只是为了让你先把“BRAM 改造后的功能正确性”一层层确认下来。

如果你要，我下一条就直接给你：

# 我建议怎么试

不要一下子直接冲到最大，按这个顺序最稳：

## 先试
- `PAR_OB = 2`

## 再试
- `PAR_OB = 4`

## 最后试
- `PAR_OB = 8`

这样如果出错，你能很快知道问题是从哪一级开始出现的。

---

# 为什么现在值得试高并行
你现在已经证明了两件事：

### 1. 单个 OB engine 是对的
`fc1_ob_engine_shared_input` 已经过了。

### 2. 调度层在 `PAR_OB=1` 时是对的
`fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom` 也过了。

所以接下来高并行度主要新增的风险只剩两类：

- `base_ob + g_ob` 的并行映射有没有问题
- `fc1_acc_all[g_ob*TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE + g_idx]` 的拼接有没有问题

这时候上 `PAR_OB=2/4/8` 是很合适的。

---

# 我不建议你直接先改主系统
先别急着把整个 `mnist_inference_core_board` 或 top 全并上去测。  
因为现在最值钱的是：

> **先把 `fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom` 这个模块本身在高并行下测稳。**

这样后面如果整系统错了，你就知道不是 FC1 这层的问题。

---

# 具体建议

## 现在就做
把刚才那个 `tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv`：

- 参数改成 `PAR_OB = 2`
- golden 也同时对两个 output blocks 算
- 比较 `fc1_acc_all[0 : 2*TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1]`

如果 `PAR_OB=2` 过了，再扩到 `4`，最后 `8`。

---

**值得试，但按阶梯试。**  
不要一步到 8，先 2、再 4、再 8。

## 下一步最应该改的文件
**`rtl/core/input_buffer.sv`**

原因：
- 你已经把 `mnist_sample_rom.sv` 这条“多样本 sample ROM 路径”改成 BRAM 版并测通了
- 与它对应的“单样本 input_*.hex 路径”就是 `input_buffer.sv`
- 这个模块和 `mnist_sample_rom` 本质同类，旧版也是：
  - 逐元素一行 hex
  - `always_comb`
  - 一次输出整个 tile
- 把它改完后，后面你再改：
  - `fc1_multi_block_shared_input.sv`
  - 或者兼容其他老路径
  会更稳

所以现在最合理的顺序是：

1. `input_buffer.sv`
2. `fc1_multi_block_shared_input.sv`
3. 再往上看 `mnist_inference_core_board.sv` / 主系统接法

---

# 1) 修改后的 `rtl/core/input_buffer.sv`

这版改成：

- 新增 `clk`
- 读取 **packed input tile**
- 一拍同步读
- 输出接口仍保持：
  - `x_tile[16]`
  - `x_eff_tile[16]`

```systemverilog
module input_buffer #(
    parameter string DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE = "input_0.hex"
) (
    input logic clk,
    input logic [$clog2(mnist_cim_pkg::N_INPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ib,

    output logic signed [mnist_cim_pkg::INPUT_WIDTH-1:0]
        x_tile[0:mnist_cim_pkg::TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1],

    output logic [mnist_cim_pkg::X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]
        x_eff_tile[0:mnist_cim_pkg::TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1]
);

  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  localparam int TILE_BITS  = TILE_INPUT_SIZE * INPUT_WIDTH;
  localparam int TILE_DEPTH = N_INPUT_BLOCKS;

  // One packed line = one input tile
  (* rom_style = "block" *)
  logic [TILE_BITS-1:0] input_mem [0:TILE_DEPTH-1];

  logic [TILE_BITS-1:0] tile_word_r;

  integer tc;
  integer x_eff_tmp;

  initial begin
`ifndef SYNTHESIS
    $display("Using packed INPUT_HEX_FILE: %s", DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE);
`endif
    $readmemh(DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE, input_mem);
  end

  // synchronous ROM read
  always_ff @(posedge clk) begin
    tile_word_r <= input_mem[ib];
  end

  // unpack tile
  always_comb begin
    for (tc = 0; tc < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; tc = tc + 1) begin
      x_tile[tc] = tile_word_r[tc*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH];

      x_eff_tmp = $signed(x_tile[tc]) - INPUT_ZERO_POINT;
      if (x_eff_tmp < 0)
        x_eff_tile[tc] = '0;
      else if (x_eff_tmp > ((1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1))
        x_eff_tile[tc] = {X_EFF_WIDTH{1'b1}};
      else
        x_eff_tile[tc] = x_eff_tmp[X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0];
    end
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 2) 独立 tb：`tb/tb_input_buffer.sv`

这个 tb 测：

- `ib=0`
- `ib=1`

并同时检查：

- `x_tile`
- `x_eff_tile`

这里默认读：

```text
../data_packed/samples/input_0.hex
```

所以要继续记住：  
**`input_0.hex` 现在必须是 packed tile 格式，不是旧的逐元素一行格式。**

```systemverilog
`timescale 1ns / 1ps

module tb_input_buffer;
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  parameter string DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/samples/input_0.hex";

  logic clk;
  logic [$clog2(N_INPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ib;

  logic signed [INPUT_WIDTH-1:0] x_tile[0:TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1];
  logic [X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]        x_eff_tile[0:TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1];

  localparam int TILE_BITS  = TILE_INPUT_SIZE * INPUT_WIDTH;
  localparam int TILE_DEPTH = N_INPUT_BLOCKS;

  logic [TILE_BITS-1:0] golden_input_mem [0:TILE_DEPTH-1];
  logic [TILE_BITS-1:0] golden_tile_word;

  integer i;
  integer err_count;
  integer x_eff_exp;

  input_buffer #(
      .DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE)
  ) dut (
      .clk       (clk),
      .ib        (ib),
      .x_tile    (x_tile),
      .x_eff_tile(x_eff_tile)
  );

  initial clk = 1'b0;
  always #5 clk = ~clk;

  initial begin
    $display("============================================================");
    $display("tb_input_buffer");
    $display("DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE = %s", DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE);
    $display("============================================================");

    $readmemh(DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE, golden_input_mem);

    err_count = 0;
    ib = '0;

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST1: ib = 0
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    golden_tile_word = golden_input_mem[0];

    @(posedge clk);
    ib <= '0;

    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST1] check ib=0");
    for (i = 0; i < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; i = i + 1) begin
      if (x_tile[i] !== golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST1 x_tile i=%0d got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
                 i,
                 x_tile[i] & 8'hFF,
                 golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH] & 8'hFF);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end

      x_eff_exp = $signed(golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH]) - INPUT_ZERO_POINT;
      if (x_eff_exp < 0)
        x_eff_exp = 0;
      else if (x_eff_exp > ((1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1))
        x_eff_exp = (1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1;

      if (x_eff_tile[i] !== x_eff_exp[X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST1 x_eff i=%0d got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
                 i,
                 x_eff_tile[i],
                 x_eff_exp[X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST2: ib = 1
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    golden_tile_word = golden_input_mem[1];

    @(posedge clk);
    ib <= 1;

    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST2] check ib=1");
    for (i = 0; i < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; i = i + 1) begin
      if (x_tile[i] !== golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST2 x_tile i=%0d got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
                 i,
                 x_tile[i] & 8'hFF,
                 golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH] & 8'hFF);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end

      x_eff_exp = $signed(golden_tile_word[i*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH]) - INPUT_ZERO_POINT;
      if (x_eff_exp < 0)
        x_eff_exp = 0;
      else if (x_eff_exp > ((1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1))
        x_eff_exp = (1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1;

      if (x_eff_tile[i] !== x_eff_exp[X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]) begin
        $display("ERROR TEST2 x_eff i=%0d got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
                 i,
                 x_eff_tile[i],
                 x_eff_exp[X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    if (err_count == 0) begin
      $display("PASS: input_buffer tile addressing/unpacking/x_eff is correct.");
    end else begin
      $display("FAIL: input_buffer found %0d mismatches.", err_count);
    end

    $finish;
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 3) 脚本：`scripts/run_tb_input_buffer.sh`

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

SIM_DIR=../sim
RTL_DIR=../rtl
TB_DIR=../tb

mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}
mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}/log

vcs -full64 -sverilog -timescale=1ns/1ps \
	-debug_access+all \
	-o ${SIM_DIR}/tb_input_buffer_simv \
	${RTL_DIR}/pkg/package.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/input_buffer.sv \
	${TB_DIR}/tb_input_buffer.sv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/compile_tb_input_buffer.log

${SIM_DIR}/tb_input_buffer_simv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/sim_tb_input_buffer.log
```

因为你当前有两条输入路径：

- `mnist_sample_rom.sv` → 多样本 sample ROM 路径

### 还没改
- `input_buffer.sv` → 单样本 input_*.hex 路径

把这两条都改成统一的 BRAM 风格后，后面你再改：

- `fc1_multi_block_shared_input.sv`

就会非常顺。

## 下一个最应该改的文件
**`rtl/core/fc1_multi_block_shared_input.sv`**

原因：
- 这是 `input_buffer` 路径对应的 FC1 调度模块
- 它和你已经跑通的 `fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv` 是一对
- 现在 `input_buffer` 已经改成同步读了，这里也必须加 `S_WAIT` 一类等待拍
- 改完它，FC1 的两条输入路径就都打通了：
  - sample ROM 路径 ✅
  - input_buffer 路径 ✅

---

# 1) 修改后的 `rtl/core/fc1_multi_block_shared_input.sv`

```systemverilog
module fc1_multi_block_shared_input #(
    parameter int PAR_OB = 8,
    parameter int BASE_OB = 0,
    parameter string DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE = "input_0.hex",
    parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "fc1_weight_int8.hex",
    parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE = "fc1_bias_int32.hex"
) (
    input logic clk,
    input logic rst_n,
    input logic start,

    output logic busy,
    output logic done,

    output logic signed [mnist_cim_pkg::PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]
        fc1_acc_all [0:PAR_OB*mnist_cim_pkg::TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1]
);
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  typedef enum logic [2:0] {
    S_IDLE  = 3'd0,
    S_CLEAR = 3'd1,
    S_READ  = 3'd2,
    S_WAIT  = 3'd3,
    S_ACCUM = 3'd4,
    S_DONE  = 3'd5
  } state_t;

  state_t state, state_n;

  logic [$clog2(N_INPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] ib, ib_n;

  logic clear_psum;
  logic en_psum;

  logic signed [INPUT_WIDTH-1:0] x_tile[0:TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1];
  logic [X_EFF_WIDTH-1:0]        x_eff_tile[0:TILE_INPUT_SIZE-1];

  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0] fc1_acc_block[0:PAR_OB-1][0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];

  input_buffer #(
      .DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE)
  ) u_input_buffer (
      .clk       (clk),
      .ib        (ib),
      .x_tile    (x_tile),
      .x_eff_tile(x_eff_tile)
  );

  always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
      state <= S_IDLE;
      ib    <= '0;
    end else begin
      state <= state_n;
      ib    <= ib_n;
    end
  end

  always_comb begin
    state_n    = state;
    ib_n       = ib;
    clear_psum = 1'b0;
    en_psum    = 1'b0;
    busy       = 1'b0;
    done       = 1'b0;

    case (state)
      S_IDLE: begin
        ib_n = '0;
        if (start)
          state_n = S_CLEAR;
      end

      S_CLEAR: begin
        busy       = 1'b1;
        clear_psum = 1'b1;
        ib_n       = '0;
        state_n    = S_READ;
      end

      S_READ: begin
        busy    = 1'b1;
        state_n = S_WAIT;
      end

      S_WAIT: begin
        busy    = 1'b1;
        state_n = S_ACCUM;
      end

      S_ACCUM: begin
        busy    = 1'b1;
        en_psum = 1'b1;

        if (ib == N_INPUT_BLOCKS - 1) begin
          state_n = S_DONE;
          ib_n    = ib;
        end else begin
          ib_n    = ib + 1'b1;
          state_n = S_READ;
        end
      end

      S_DONE: begin
        done = 1'b1;
        if (!start)
          state_n = S_IDLE;
      end

      default: begin
        state_n    = S_IDLE;
        ib_n       = '0;
        clear_psum = 1'b0;
        en_psum    = 1'b0;
        busy       = 1'b0;
        done       = 1'b0;
      end
    endcase
  end

  genvar g_ob, g_idx;
  generate
    for (g_ob = 0; g_ob < PAR_OB; g_ob = g_ob + 1) begin : GEN_OB_ENGINE
      localparam logic [$clog2(N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS)-1:0] OB_SEL = BASE_OB + g_ob;

      fc1_ob_engine_shared_input #(
          .DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE),
          .DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE  (DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE)
      ) u_fc1_ob_engine_shared_input (
          .clk         (clk),
          .rst_n       (rst_n),
          .clear_psum  (clear_psum),
          .en_psum     (en_psum),
          .ib          (ib),
          .ob_sel      (OB_SEL),
          .x_eff_tile  (x_eff_tile),
          .fc1_acc_block(fc1_acc_block[g_ob])
      );

      for (g_idx = 0; g_idx < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; g_idx = g_idx + 1) begin : GEN_PACK
        assign fc1_acc_all[g_ob*TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE + g_idx] = fc1_acc_block[g_ob][g_idx];
      end
    end
  endgenerate

endmodule
```

---

# 2) 独立 tb：`tb/tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_input.sv`

这个 tb 和你已经通过的 `tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom.sv` 同风格。  
这里我先用：

- `PAR_OB = 1`
- `BASE_OB = 0`
- `DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE = ../data_packed/samples/input_0.hex`

先把这条路径单独验通。

```systemverilog
`timescale 1ns / 1ps

module tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_input;
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  parameter int PAR_OB = 1;
  parameter int BASE_OB = 0;
  parameter string DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE  = "../data_packed/samples/input_0.hex";
  parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/weights/fc1_weight_int8.hex";
  parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE   = "../data_packed/weights/fc1_bias_int32.hex";

  logic clk;
  logic rst_n;
  logic start;

  logic busy, done;
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0] fc1_acc_all[0:PAR_OB*TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];

  localparam int INPUT_TILE_BITS   = TILE_INPUT_SIZE * INPUT_WIDTH;
  localparam int INPUT_TILE_DEPTH  = N_INPUT_BLOCKS;
  localparam int WEIGHT_TILE_BITS  = TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE * TILE_INPUT_SIZE * WEIGHT_WIDTH;
  localparam int WEIGHT_TILE_DEPTH = N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS * N_INPUT_BLOCKS;
  localparam int BIAS_BLOCK_BITS   = TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE * BIAS_WIDTH;

  logic [INPUT_TILE_BITS-1:0]  golden_input_mem [0:INPUT_TILE_DEPTH-1];
  logic [WEIGHT_TILE_BITS-1:0] golden_weight_mem[0:WEIGHT_TILE_DEPTH-1];
  logic [BIAS_BLOCK_BITS-1:0]  golden_bias_mem  [0:N_OUTPUT_BLOCKS-1];

  integer ib_idx, r, c;
  integer err_count;
  integer weight_tile_idx;
  integer x_eff_tmp;
  logic signed [INPUT_WIDTH-1:0]  input_val;
  logic signed [WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:0] weight_val;
  logic signed [BIAS_WIDTH-1:0]   bias_val;
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]   golden_acc[0:TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE-1];

  fc1_multi_block_shared_input #(
      .PAR_OB(PAR_OB),
      .BASE_OB(BASE_OB),
      .DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE),
      .DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE),
      .DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE)
  ) dut (
      .clk        (clk),
      .rst_n      (rst_n),
      .start      (start),
      .busy       (busy),
      .done       (done),
      .fc1_acc_all(fc1_acc_all)
  );

  initial clk = 1'b0;
  always #5 clk = ~clk;

  initial begin
    $display("============================================================");
    $display("tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_input");
    $display("DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE  = %s", DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE);
    $display("DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = %s", DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE);
    $display("DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE   = %s", DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE);
    $display("============================================================");

    $readmemh(DEFAULT_INPUT_HEX_FILE,  golden_input_mem);
    $readmemh(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE, golden_weight_mem);
    $readmemh(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE,   golden_bias_mem);

    err_count = 0;
    rst_n     = 1'b0;
    start     = 1'b0;

    for (r = 0; r < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; r = r + 1) begin
      bias_val = golden_bias_mem[BASE_OB][r*BIAS_WIDTH +: BIAS_WIDTH];
      golden_acc[r] = bias_val;
    end

    for (ib_idx = 0; ib_idx < N_INPUT_BLOCKS; ib_idx = ib_idx + 1) begin
      weight_tile_idx = BASE_OB * N_INPUT_BLOCKS + ib_idx;

      for (r = 0; r < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; r = r + 1) begin
        for (c = 0; c < TILE_INPUT_SIZE; c = c + 1) begin
          input_val = golden_input_mem[ib_idx][c*INPUT_WIDTH +: INPUT_WIDTH];
          x_eff_tmp = $signed(input_val) - INPUT_ZERO_POINT;
          if (x_eff_tmp < 0)
            x_eff_tmp = 0;
          else if (x_eff_tmp > ((1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1))
            x_eff_tmp = (1 << X_EFF_WIDTH) - 1;

          weight_val = golden_weight_mem[weight_tile_idx][(r*TILE_INPUT_SIZE+c)*WEIGHT_WIDTH +: WEIGHT_WIDTH];
          golden_acc[r] = golden_acc[r] + $signed(weight_val) * x_eff_tmp;
        end
      end
    end

    @(posedge clk);
    rst_n <= 1'b1;

    @(posedge clk);
    start <= 1'b1;

    @(posedge clk);
    start <= 1'b0;

    wait (done == 1'b1);
    #1;

    $display("[CHECK] compare fc1_acc_all");
    for (r = 0; r < TILE_OUTPUT_SIZE; r = r + 1) begin
      if (fc1_acc_all[r] !== golden_acc[r]) begin
        $display("ERROR r=%0d got=%0d exp=%0d", r, fc1_acc_all[r], golden_acc[r]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    if (err_count == 0) begin
      $display("PASS: fc1_multi_block_shared_input end-to-end block result is correct.");
    end else begin
      $display("FAIL: fc1_multi_block_shared_input found %0d mismatches.", err_count);
    end

    $finish;
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 3) 脚本：`scripts/run_tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_input.sh`

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

SIM_DIR=../sim
RTL_DIR=../rtl
TB_DIR=../tb

mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}
mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}/log

vcs -full64 -sverilog -timescale=1ns/1ps \
	-debug_access+all \
	-o ${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_input_simv \
	${RTL_DIR}/pkg/package.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/input_buffer.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc1_weight_bank.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc1_bias_bank.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/cim_tile.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/psum_accum.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/fc1_ob_engine_shared_input.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/fc1_multi_block_shared_input.sv \
	${TB_DIR}/tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_input.sv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/compile_tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_input.log

${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_input_simv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/sim_tb_fc1_multi_block_shared_input.log
```

---

# 4) 为什么现在先改这个
因为这样你就会把 FC1 的两条输入路径都补齐：

## sample 路径
- `mnist_sample_rom`
- `fc1_multi_block_shared_sample_rom`

## input 路径
- `input_buffer`
- `fc1_multi_block_shared_input`

这样后面再往上接 `mnist_inference_core_board` 时，FC1 这一层几乎不再有未知点。

# 下一步最应该改的文件
## `rtl/mem/fc2_weight_bank.sv`

原因很明确：

- 现在 FC1 侧已经稳定
- FC2 现在仍然是资源大户
- `fc2_weight_bank.sv` 还是最典型的：
  - 整矩阵展开
  - `always_comb`
  - 非 BRAM-friendly
- FC2 要真正 BRAM 化，第一步就是把它改成：
  - **单地址**
  - **单 weight 输出**
  - **同步读**

这也是后面改 `fc2_core_with_file.sv` 的前置条件。

---

# 1) 修改后的 `rtl/mem/fc2_weight_bank.sv`

这版接口改成：

- 输入：
  - `clk`
  - `addr`
- 输出：
  - `w_data`

也就是每拍读一个 weight。

## 重要说明
这里我**先保持 `fc2_weight_int8.hex` 还是旧格式：逐元素一行**。  
也就是说：

- **这个文件现在不需要 packed**
- 你上面的 Python 重整 `data` 脚本，这一步**不用处理 fc2_weight**
- 也就是说 `fc2_weight_int8.hex` 仍可直接用 `data/weights/...` 或复制到 `data_packed/weights/...` 原样不变

```systemverilog
module fc2_weight_bank #(
    parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "fc2_weight_int8.hex"
) (
    input  logic clk,
    input  logic [$clog2(mnist_cim_pkg::FC2_WEIGHT_DEPTH)-1:0] addr,
    output logic signed [mnist_cim_pkg::WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:0] w_data
);
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  (* rom_style = "block" *)
  logic signed [WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:0] weight_mem[0:FC2_WEIGHT_DEPTH-1];

  initial begin
`ifndef SYNTHESIS
    $display("Using default FC2_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE: %s", DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE);
`endif
    $readmemh(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE, weight_mem);
  end

  // synchronous ROM read
  always_ff @(posedge clk) begin
    w_data <= weight_mem[addr];
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 2) 独立 tb：`tb/tb_fc2_weight_bank.sv`

这个 tb 测：

- `addr=0`
- `addr=1`
- `addr=FC2_WEIGHT_DEPTH-1`

并检查：
- 下一拍的 `w_data` 是否正确

默认读：

```text
../data_packed/weights/fc2_weight_int8.hex
```

但这里再次强调：  
**fc2_weight_int8.hex 此时仍然是旧的逐元素一行格式，不需要 packed。**

```systemverilog
`timescale 1ns / 1ps

module tb_fc2_weight_bank;
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/weights/fc2_weight_int8.hex";

  logic clk;
  logic [$clog2(FC2_WEIGHT_DEPTH)-1:0] addr;
  logic signed [WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:0] w_data;

  logic signed [WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:0] golden_weight_mem[0:FC2_WEIGHT_DEPTH-1];

  integer err_count;

  fc2_weight_bank #(
      .DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE)
  ) dut (
      .clk   (clk),
      .addr  (addr),
      .w_data(w_data)
  );

  initial clk = 1'b0;
  always #5 clk = ~clk;

  initial begin
    $display("============================================================");
    $display("tb_fc2_weight_bank");
    $display("DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = %s", DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE);
    $display("============================================================");

    $readmemh(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE, golden_weight_mem);

    err_count = 0;
    addr = '0;

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST1: addr = 0
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    @(posedge clk);
    addr <= '0;

    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST1] check addr=0");
    if (w_data !== golden_weight_mem[0]) begin
      $display("ERROR TEST1 got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
               w_data & 8'hFF, golden_weight_mem[0] & 8'hFF);
      err_count = err_count + 1;
    end

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST2: addr = 1
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    @(posedge clk);
    addr <= 1;

    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST2] check addr=1");
    if (w_data !== golden_weight_mem[1]) begin
      $display("ERROR TEST2 got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
               w_data & 8'hFF, golden_weight_mem[1] & 8'hFF);
      err_count = err_count + 1;
    end

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST3: last address
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    @(posedge clk);
    addr <= FC2_WEIGHT_DEPTH - 1;

    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST3] check addr=%0d", FC2_WEIGHT_DEPTH - 1);
    if (w_data !== golden_weight_mem[FC2_WEIGHT_DEPTH - 1]) begin
      $display("ERROR TEST3 got=0x%02x exp=0x%02x",
               w_data & 8'hFF, golden_weight_mem[FC2_WEIGHT_DEPTH - 1] & 8'hFF);
      err_count = err_count + 1;
    end

    if (err_count == 0) begin
      $display("PASS: fc2_weight_bank synchronous single-word read is correct.");
    end else begin
      $display("FAIL: fc2_weight_bank found %0d mismatches.", err_count);
    end

    $finish;
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 3) 脚本：`scripts/run_tb_fc2_weight_bank.sh`

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

SIM_DIR=../sim
RTL_DIR=../rtl
TB_DIR=../tb

mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}
mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}/log

vcs -full64 -sverilog -timescale=1ns/1ps \
	-debug_access+all \
	-o ${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc2_weight_bank_simv \
	${RTL_DIR}/pkg/package.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc2_weight_bank.sv \
	${TB_DIR}/tb_fc2_weight_bank.sv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/compile_tb_fc2_weight_bank.log

${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc2_weight_bank_simv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/sim_tb_fc2_weight_bank.log
```

---

# 4) 为什么现在先改 `fc2_weight_bank`
因为 FC2 要真正 BRAM 化，顺序最自然是：

1. `fc2_weight_bank.sv`
2. `fc2_bias_bank.sv`
3. `fc2_core_with_file.sv`
4. `fc1_to_fc2_top_with_file.sv`
5. `mnist_inference_core_board.sv`

也就是先把 FC2 的存储口变成同步读，再改 FC2 核心。

---

# 5) 这一步对 Python 数据重整脚本的影响

## 这一步：**不需要再次用 Python 脚本重整 fc2_weight**
因为当前这个 `fc2_weight_bank.sv` 仍然读的是：

- **逐元素一行** 的 `fc2_weight_int8.hex`

所以：

- `fc2_weight_int8.hex` 还是原格式
- `fc2_bias_int32.hex` 还是原格式
- 你的 Python 脚本现在仍然只负责：
  - `fc1_weight`
  - `fc1_bias`
  - `mnist_sample_rom`
  - `input_*`

## 再提醒一次
现在这些文件仍然是 **packed 格式**，别混回旧格式：
- `fc1_weight_int8.hex`
- `fc1_bias_int32.hex`
- `mnist_samples_route_b_output_2.hex`
- `input_*.hex`

但：
- `fc2_weight_int8.hex`
- `fc2_bias_int32.hex`

目前还是旧格式逐元素一行。

## 下一步最应该改的文件
**`rtl/mem/fc2_bias_bank.sv`**

原因：
- 现在 FC2 存储侧已经改了一半：
  - `fc2_weight_bank` ✅ 同步单字读
  - `fc2_bias_bank` 还没改
- 后面要改 `fc2_core_with_file.sv` 时，最自然就是：
  - 每次按 `out_idx` 读一个 bias
  - 再按 `out_idx * FC2_IN_DIM + in_idx` 逐拍读 weight
- 所以先把 `fc2_bias_bank` 也改成同步单字读，接口统一，后面改核心最顺

---

# 1) 修改后的 `rtl/mem/fc2_bias_bank.sv`

这版接口改成：

- 输入：
  - `clk`
  - `addr`
- 输出：
  - `bias_data`

并且保持 `fc2_bias_int32.hex` 还是**旧格式逐元素一行**，不需要 packed。

```systemverilog
module fc2_bias_bank #(
    parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE = "fc2_bias_int32.hex"
) (
    input  logic clk,
    input  logic [$clog2(mnist_cim_pkg::FC2_OUT_DIM)-1:0] addr,
    output logic signed [mnist_cim_pkg::BIAS_WIDTH-1:0] bias_data
);
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  (* rom_style = "block" *)
  logic signed [BIAS_WIDTH-1:0] bias_mem[0:FC2_OUT_DIM-1];

  initial begin
`ifndef SYNTHESIS
    $display("Using default FC2_BIAS_FILE: %s", DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE);
`endif
    $readmemh(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE, bias_mem);
  end

  // synchronous ROM read
  always_ff @(posedge clk) begin
    bias_data <= bias_mem[addr];
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 2) 独立 tb：`tb/tb_fc2_bias_bank.sv`

这个 tb 测：

- `addr=0`
- `addr=1`
- `addr=FC2_OUT_DIM-1`

并检查：
- 下一拍的 `bias_data` 是否正确

默认读：

```text
../data_packed/weights/fc2_bias_int32.hex
```

但这里再次强调：  
**fc2_bias_int32.hex 目前仍然是旧格式逐元素一行，不需要 packed。**

```systemverilog
`timescale 1ns / 1ps

module tb_fc2_bias_bank;
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/weights/fc2_bias_int32.hex";

  logic clk;
  logic [$clog2(FC2_OUT_DIM)-1:0] addr;
  logic signed [BIAS_WIDTH-1:0] bias_data;

  logic signed [BIAS_WIDTH-1:0] golden_bias_mem[0:FC2_OUT_DIM-1];

  fc2_bias_bank #(
      .DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE)
  ) dut (
      .clk      (clk),
      .addr     (addr),
      .bias_data(bias_data)
  );

  initial clk = 1'b0;
  always #5 clk = ~clk;

  initial begin
    $display("============================================================");
    $display("tb_fc2_bias_bank");
    $display("DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE = %s", DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE);
    $display("============================================================");

    $readmemh(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE, golden_bias_mem);

    err_count = 0;
    addr = '0;

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST1: addr = 0
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    @(posedge clk);
    addr <= '0;

    @(posedge clk);
    #1;

    $display("[TEST1] check addr=0");
    if (bias_data !== golden_bias_mem[0]) begin
      $display("ERROR TEST1 got=0x%08x exp=0x%08x",
               bias_data, golden_bias_mem[0]);
      err_count = err_count + 1;
    end

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST2: addr = 1
    // ----------------------------------------------------------

    $display("[TEST2] check addr=1");
    if (bias_data !== golden_bias_mem[1]) begin
      $display("ERROR TEST2 got=0x%08x exp=0x%08x",
               bias_data, golden_bias_mem[1]);
      err_count = err_count + 1;
    end

    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    // TEST3: last address
    // ----------------------------------------------------------
    @(posedge clk);
    addr <= FC2_OUT_DIM - 1;

    @(posedge clk);

    $display("[TEST3] check addr=%0d", FC2_OUT_DIM - 1);
    if (bias_data !== golden_bias_mem[FC2_OUT_DIM - 1]) begin

    if (err_count == 0) begin
      $display("PASS: fc2_bias_bank synchronous single-word read is correct.");
    end else begin
      $display("FAIL: fc2_bias_bank found %0d mismatches.", err_count);
    end

    $finish;
  end

endmodule
```

## `rtl/core/fc2_core_with_file.sv`

因为现在 FC2 存储侧已经都改好了：

- `fc2_weight_bank.sv` ✅
- `fc2_bias_bank.sv` ✅

接下来就该把 FC2 核心从原来的：

- 整矩阵 `w_all`
- 整个 `bias_all`
- 组合式访问

改成：

- 单地址读 weight
- 单地址读 bias
- 逐拍 MAC
- 同步等待 1 拍 ROM 输出

你前面上传的 zip 我这边现在不能再重新读取了；如果你之后想让我再次核对仓库里的具体文件内容，需要你重新上传。不过按你当前已经通过的链路，这一步可以继续推进。

---

# 1) 修改后的 `rtl/core/fc2_core_with_file.sv`

这版接口保持你前面 BRAM 化方向一致：

- 输入：
  - `clk`
  - `rst_n`
  - `start`
  - `fc2_requant_mult`
  - `fc2_requant_shift`
  - `fc1_out_all`
- 输出：
  - `busy`
  - `done`
  - `fc2_acc_all`
  - `logits_all`

核心思路：
- `S_INIT`：按 `out_idx` 读 bias
- `S_BIAS_WAIT`：等 1 拍 bias 输出
- `S_READ_W`：给出当前 `(out_idx, in_idx)` 的 weight 地址
- `S_W_WAIT`：等 1 拍 weight 输出
- `S_MAC`：做一次 MAC
- 全部 `in_idx` 完成后，写回 `fc2_acc_all/out_idx` 和 `logits_all/out_idx`

```systemverilog
module fc2_core_with_file #(
    parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "fc2_weight_int8.hex",
    parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE   = "fc2_bias_int32.hex"
) (
    input logic clk,
    input logic rst_n,
    input logic start,

    input logic [31:0] fc2_requant_mult,
    input logic [31:0] fc2_requant_shift,

    input logic signed [mnist_cim_pkg::OUTPUT_WIDTH-1:0]
        fc1_out_all[0:mnist_cim_pkg::FC2_IN_DIM-1],

    output logic busy,
    output logic done,

    output logic signed [mnist_cim_pkg::PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]
        fc2_acc_all[0:mnist_cim_pkg::FC2_OUT_DIM-1],

    output logic signed [mnist_cim_pkg::OUTPUT_WIDTH-1:0]
        logits_all[0:mnist_cim_pkg::FC2_OUT_DIM-1]
);
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  typedef enum logic [2:0] {
    S_IDLE      = 3'd0,
    S_INIT      = 3'd1,
    S_BIAS_WAIT = 3'd2,
    S_READ_W    = 3'd3,
    S_W_WAIT    = 3'd4,
    S_MAC       = 3'd5,
    S_STORE     = 3'd6,
    S_DONE      = 3'd7
  } state_t;

  state_t state, state_n;

  logic [$clog2(FC2_OUT_DIM)-1:0] out_idx, out_idx_n;
  logic [$clog2(FC2_IN_DIM)-1:0]  in_idx,  in_idx_n;

  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0] acc_reg, acc_reg_n;

  logic [$clog2(FC2_WEIGHT_DEPTH)-1:0] weight_addr;
  logic signed [WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:0]      weight_data;

  logic [$clog2(FC2_OUT_DIM)-1:0]      bias_addr;
  logic signed [BIAS_WIDTH-1:0]        bias_data;

  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0] mul_term;
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0] acc_after_mul;

  integer k;

  assign weight_addr = out_idx * FC2_IN_DIM + in_idx;
  assign bias_addr   = out_idx;

  fc2_weight_bank #(
      .DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE)
  ) u_fc2_weight_bank (
      .clk   (clk),
      .addr  (weight_addr),
      .w_data(weight_data)
  );

  fc2_bias_bank #(
      .DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE)
  ) u_fc2_bias_bank (
      .clk      (clk),
      .addr     (bias_addr),
      .bias_data(bias_data)
  );

  function automatic signed [OUTPUT_WIDTH-1:0] requantize_int32_to_int8(
      input logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0] x,
      input logic [31:0] mult,
      input logic [31:0] rshift
  );
    longint signed prod;
    longint signed shifted;
    begin
      prod = x * $signed(mult);

      if (rshift == 0)
        shifted = prod;
      else
        shifted = (prod + (64'sd1 <<< (rshift - 1))) >>> rshift;

      if (shifted > 127)
        requantize_int32_to_int8 = 8'sd127;
      else if (shifted < -128)
        requantize_int32_to_int8 = -8'sd128;
      else
        requantize_int32_to_int8 = shifted[OUTPUT_WIDTH-1:0];
    end
  endfunction

  assign mul_term      = $signed(fc1_out_all[in_idx]) * $signed(weight_data);
  assign acc_after_mul = acc_reg + mul_term;

  always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
      state   <= S_IDLE;
      out_idx <= '0;
      in_idx  <= '0;
      acc_reg <= '0;

      for (k = 0; k < FC2_OUT_DIM; k = k + 1) begin
        fc2_acc_all[k] <= '0;
        logits_all[k]  <= '0;
      end
    end else begin
      state   <= state_n;
      out_idx <= out_idx_n;
      in_idx  <= in_idx_n;
      acc_reg <= acc_reg_n;

      if (state == S_IDLE && start) begin
        for (k = 0; k < FC2_OUT_DIM; k = k + 1) begin
          fc2_acc_all[k] <= '0;
          logits_all[k]  <= '0;
        end
      end

      if (state == S_STORE) begin
        fc2_acc_all[out_idx] <= acc_reg;
        logits_all[out_idx]  <= requantize_int32_to_int8(
            acc_reg, fc2_requant_mult, fc2_requant_shift
        );
      end
    end
  end

  always_comb begin
    state_n   = state;
    out_idx_n = out_idx;
    in_idx_n  = in_idx;
    acc_reg_n = acc_reg;

    busy = 1'b0;
    done = 1'b0;

    case (state)
      S_IDLE: begin
        if (start) begin
          out_idx_n = '0;
          in_idx_n  = '0;
          acc_reg_n = '0;
          state_n   = S_INIT;
        end
      end

      S_INIT: begin
        busy      = 1'b1;
        in_idx_n  = '0;
        state_n   = S_BIAS_WAIT;
      end

      S_BIAS_WAIT: begin
        busy      = 1'b1;
        acc_reg_n = bias_data;
        state_n   = S_READ_W;
      end

      S_READ_W: begin
        busy    = 1'b1;
        state_n = S_W_WAIT;
      end

      S_W_WAIT: begin
        busy    = 1'b1;
        state_n = S_MAC;
      end

      S_MAC: begin
        busy      = 1'b1;
        acc_reg_n = acc_after_mul;

        if (in_idx == FC2_IN_DIM - 1) begin
          state_n = S_STORE;
        end else begin
          in_idx_n = in_idx + 1'b1;
          state_n  = S_READ_W;
        end
      end

      S_STORE: begin
        busy = 1'b1;
        if (out_idx == FC2_OUT_DIM - 1) begin
          state_n = S_DONE;
        end else begin
          out_idx_n = out_idx + 1'b1;
          in_idx_n  = '0;
          acc_reg_n = '0;
          state_n   = S_INIT;
        end
      end

      S_DONE: begin
        done = 1'b1;
        if (!start)
          state_n = S_IDLE;
      end

      default: begin
        state_n   = S_IDLE;
        out_idx_n = '0;
        in_idx_n  = '0;
        acc_reg_n = '0;
        busy      = 1'b0;
        done      = 1'b0;
      end
    endcase
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 2) 独立 tb：`tb/tb_fc2_core_with_file.sv`

这个 tb 先做一个**功能正确性单测**，不依赖整系统：

- 给一组简单、确定性的 `fc1_out_all`
- 从 `fc2_weight_int8.hex` / `fc2_bias_int32.hex` 读 golden
- 按软件方式算出 `fc2_acc_all`
- 用同样的 requant 规则算出 `logits_all`
- 等 `done`
- 比较 `fc2_acc_all[0:9]` 和 `logits_all[0:9]`

这里默认继续读：

- `../data_packed/weights/fc2_weight_int8.hex`
- `../data_packed/weights/fc2_bias_int32.hex`

但再次提醒：
**这两个文件此时仍然是旧格式逐元素一行，不需要 packed。**

```systemverilog
`timescale 1ns / 1ps

module tb_fc2_core_with_file;
  import mnist_cim_pkg::*;

  parameter string DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = "../data_packed/weights/fc2_weight_int8.hex";
  parameter string DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE   = "../data_packed/weights/fc2_bias_int32.hex";

  logic clk;
  logic rst_n;
  logic start;

  logic [31:0] fc2_requant_mult;
  logic [31:0] fc2_requant_shift;

  logic signed [OUTPUT_WIDTH-1:0] fc1_out_all[0:FC2_IN_DIM-1];

  logic busy, done;
  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]   fc2_acc_all[0:FC2_OUT_DIM-1];
  logic signed [OUTPUT_WIDTH-1:0] logits_all[0:FC2_OUT_DIM-1];

  logic signed [WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:0] golden_weight_mem[0:FC2_WEIGHT_DEPTH-1];
  logic signed [BIAS_WIDTH-1:0]   golden_bias_mem[0:FC2_OUT_DIM-1];

  logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0]   golden_fc2_acc[0:FC2_OUT_DIM-1];
  logic signed [OUTPUT_WIDTH-1:0] golden_logits [0:FC2_OUT_DIM-1];

  integer o, i;
  integer err_count;
  longint signed tmp_acc;
  longint signed prod;
  longint signed shifted;

  fc2_core_with_file #(
      .DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE),
      .DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE  (DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE)
  ) dut (
      .clk              (clk),
      .rst_n            (rst_n),
      .start            (start),
      .fc2_requant_mult (fc2_requant_mult),
      .fc2_requant_shift(fc2_requant_shift),
      .fc1_out_all      (fc1_out_all),
      .busy             (busy),
      .done             (done),
      .fc2_acc_all      (fc2_acc_all),
      .logits_all       (logits_all)
  );

  initial clk = 1'b0;
  always #5 clk = ~clk;

  function automatic signed [OUTPUT_WIDTH-1:0] golden_requant(
      input logic signed [PSUM_WIDTH-1:0] x,
      input logic [31:0] mult,
      input logic [31:0] rshift
  );
    longint signed f_prod;
    longint signed f_shifted;
    begin
      f_prod = x * $signed(mult);
      if (rshift == 0)
        f_shifted = f_prod;
      else
        f_shifted = (f_prod + (64'sd1 <<< (rshift - 1))) >>> rshift;

      if (f_shifted > 127)
        golden_requant = 8'sd127;
      else if (f_shifted < -128)
        golden_requant = -8'sd128;
      else
        golden_requant = f_shifted[OUTPUT_WIDTH-1:0];
    end
  endfunction

  initial begin
    $display("============================================================");
    $display("tb_fc2_core_with_file");
    $display("DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE = %s", DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE);
    $display("DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE   = %s", DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE);
    $display("============================================================");

    $readmemh(DEFAULT_WEIGHT_HEX_FILE, golden_weight_mem);
    $readmemh(DEFAULT_BIAS_HEX_FILE,   golden_bias_mem);

    err_count = 0;
    rst_n     = 1'b0;
    start     = 1'b0;

    // give deterministic fc1_out_all
    for (i = 0; i < FC2_IN_DIM; i = i + 1) begin
      fc1_out_all[i] = (i % 11) - 5;  // values in a small signed range
    end

    // use a simple requant setting for standalone test
    fc2_requant_mult  = 32'd1;
    fc2_requant_shift = 32'd0;

    // golden
    for (o = 0; o < FC2_OUT_DIM; o = o + 1) begin
      tmp_acc = golden_bias_mem[o];
      for (i = 0; i < FC2_IN_DIM; i = i + 1) begin
        tmp_acc = tmp_acc + $signed(fc1_out_all[i]) * $signed(golden_weight_mem[o*FC2_IN_DIM + i]);
      end
      golden_fc2_acc[o] = tmp_acc[PSUM_WIDTH-1:0];
      golden_logits[o]  = golden_requant(golden_fc2_acc[o], fc2_requant_mult, fc2_requant_shift);
    end

    @(posedge clk);
    rst_n <= 1'b1;

    @(posedge clk);
    start <= 1'b1;

    @(posedge clk);
    start <= 1'b0;

    wait (done == 1'b1);
    #1;

    $display("[CHECK] compare fc2_acc_all / logits_all");
    for (o = 0; o < FC2_OUT_DIM; o = o + 1) begin
      if (fc2_acc_all[o] !== golden_fc2_acc[o]) begin
        $display("ERROR ACC o=%0d got=%0d exp=%0d",
                 o, fc2_acc_all[o], golden_fc2_acc[o]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end

      if (logits_all[o] !== golden_logits[o]) begin
        $display("ERROR LOGIT o=%0d got=%0d exp=%0d",
                 o, logits_all[o], golden_logits[o]);
        err_count = err_count + 1;
      end
    end

    if (err_count == 0) begin
      $display("PASS: fc2_core_with_file sequential BRAM-style MAC is correct.");
    end else begin
      $display("FAIL: fc2_core_with_file found %0d mismatches.", err_count);
    end

    $finish;
  end

endmodule
```

---

# 3) 脚本：`scripts/run_tb_fc2_core_with_file.sh`

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

SIM_DIR=../sim
RTL_DIR=../rtl
TB_DIR=../tb

mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}
mkdir -p ${SIM_DIR}/log

vcs -full64 -sverilog -timescale=1ns/1ps \
	-debug_access+all \
	-o ${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc2_core_with_file_simv \
	${RTL_DIR}/pkg/package.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc2_weight_bank.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/mem/fc2_bias_bank.sv \
	${RTL_DIR}/core/fc2_core_with_file.sv \
	${TB_DIR}/tb_fc2_core_with_file.sv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/compile_tb_fc2_core_with_file.log

${SIM_DIR}/tb_fc2_core_with_file_simv \
	2>&1 | tee ${SIM_DIR}/log/sim_tb_fc2_core_with_file.log
```

---

# 4) 这一步通过后，下一步是什么
如果 `fc2_core_with_file` 通过，下一步就是：

## `rtl/core/fc1_to_fc2_top_with_file.sv`

因为它需要把：

- `fc1_relu_requantize_with_file`
- 新版 `fc2_core_with_file`

接起来，并适配：

- `clk`
- `rst_n`
- `start`
- `busy`
- `done`

再之后才是：

## `rtl/core/mnist_inference_core_board.sv`
